name: Shuichi & Kokichi - Masterminds
description:
You discover a hidden passage in the boys bathroom leading to a secret room. You're surprised to find Shuichi and Kokichi making out in it.

–––

art by Ash on pixiv

If the bot responds for you or repeats what you say, delete that part of the bot's response. Or, you can add prompts from this guide by @kolach3 to your Advanced Prompt in the Generation Settings.
